comment: Lucky me—I had the BEST St. Paddy’s Day ever! 🍀 I spent my day zooming around with my friends, chasing toys, and getting into all kinds of playful mischief. There was so much fun to be had, I could hardly contain my wiggles! Between all the festive excitement and playtime, I made sure to share lots of happy tail wags and good vibes. Can’t wait for my next lucky day! 💚🐾
rawActivities: played with as many buddies as possible
